title: Slovakian Bean Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with Slovakian ingredients and beans.
instructions: Brown the Slovakian sausage in a large pot over medium-high heat, then remove and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the soaked and drained white beans, stir-fry sauce (if using), and browned sausage back to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
